---
title: "Session 13: Project Work: Prompt Iteration & Final Evaluation"
subtitle: "Day 5 · Project Finalization & Presentations (5-1)"
format: revealjs
metadata-files:
  - _slides.yml
---

<!-- STUB DECK — structure only; content to be filled in before the course. -->

# Session 13: Project Work: Prompt Iteration & Final Evaluation

## 📋 Agenda

- Iterate your prompt over 2–3 cycles
- Run the final evaluation
- Begin the in-class one-page report

## 🎯 Learning Objectives

By the end of this session, you will be able to:

<!-- to be added -->

# Iterate your prompt

## Iterate your prompt

<!-- to be added -->

# Final evaluation run

## Final evaluation run

<!-- to be added -->

# Begin the one-page report

## Begin the one-page report

<!-- to be added -->

# Any questions?
